headline: Max and Vicki on the lash, Nana left with the crumbs
text: Brazil (Max) and USA (Vicki) were the big winners, both bagging clean-sheet wins. Morocco (Sara) also nicked it, leaving Scotland (Henry) with a sore one. At the other end, Jack and Nana had a grim old shift, both beaten without scoring. Overall, Vicki stays top with 8 points and the best goal difference, while Max is right on the case in second on 8. At the bottom, Sofia is still in the mud on 1 point, with Chris and Carolina also needing a proper turnaround.
